---
name: Propose a taxonomy change
about: Suggest a new domain, reclassify indicators, or restructure the domain hierarchy
title: "[Taxonomy] "
labels: taxonomy-change
assignees: ''
---

## Type of change

- [ ] Add a new domain
- [ ] Rename an existing domain
- [ ] Move one or more indicators to a different domain
- [ ] Add a cross-domain assignment (indicator belongs to an additional domain)
- [ ] Remove a domain
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Affected taxonomy version

**Current version:** `NDT-x.x.x`
**Proposed new version:** `NDT-x.x.x` *(a new taxonomy version will be created)*

## Affected indicators or domains

| Entity ID | Current domain(s) | Proposed change |
|---|---|---|
| | | |

## Description

<!-- What should change and why? If proposing a new domain, describe what it covers and
     why existing domains don't already handle it. -->

## Rationale

<!-- Why does the current structure not serve the framework well? What problem does this
     solve — for contributors, for evaluators, or for the framework's coherence? -->

## Open questions

<!-- Anything unresolved. For example: should an indicator be cross-listed or moved entirely?
     Should a domain be split or merged? -->
